roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT PROOF OF COMPLETION TO MULTIPLE OFFENDER DUI PROG REC'D
CERTIFICATE OF COMPLETION TO MULTIPLE OFFENDER DUI PROGRAM REC'D

/CAL:SENTENCE/X:THIS PROCEEDING IS RECORDED THROUGH JAVS,/TWS/CH2:CJSS 1Y:PROB  5 Y:PJ  150D/CTS: 22/X:AS TO COUNT 3, DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE 150 DAYS IN COUNTY JAIL, WITH 22 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED,/X:SENTENCE IN COUNTS 2 & 3 ARE CONCURRENT,/PF525 12/MOP1/LREG/IID:1 YEARS/LVAL/LCHEM/VF2:140/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/1463ALC/BKFEE/COLLECT/RESTV/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLYSET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/

/CAL:FOR DISPOSITION/X:THIS PROCEEDING IS RECORDED THROUGH JAVS,/DEF:ADMITS PRIOR MISDEMEANOR CONVICTIONS OF 23152(A) VC ON OR ABOUT 04-19-2007 IN SAN MATEO COUNTY, AND 23152(B) VC ON OR ABOUT 08-11-2010  IN SANTA CLARA COUNTY/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2 & 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:DEFT MOTION TO RECALL BW/BWR:04-03-13/NC/BWR1/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:COUNSEL RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR,/SHER/BAIL:150,000/CTORD:DEFENDANT NOT TO DRIVE; INCLUDING A CAR, MOTORCYCLE& BICYCLE IF BAILS OUT/NTW/LD:FOR TRIAL IS 05-20-13/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CONTD:JURY TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL TRIAL & POSSIBLE DISPO/LD 05-20-13/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 13/TRANS 13 FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
